markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review SEO performance and plan content optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Glossary traffic is flatlining** due to Google's AI Overviews pushing informational content down the SERP.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [**A new optimization strategy will target two groups:** pages with recent traffic drops and pages that never gained traction.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [**The "freshness" signal is back:** Adding a publish date and minor updates can boost rankings, as Google's LMs now use it as a key proxy.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [**The Question Center project is ready for feedback.** Once approved, it will replace the current TLDR cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)

## Topics

### Glossary Performance & Problem

  - [Glossary traffic is flatlining, with some pages seeing significant drops.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Primary Cause:** Google's AI Overviews are pushing informational content down the SERP.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [**Secondary Hypotheses:**](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** Inconsistent linking may be hindering Google's ability to crawl and re-index pages.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
      - [**Content Quality:** "Fine" content gets an initial boost from Homebase's high Domain Authority (DR) but then tanks when it fails to outperform competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
      - [**Content Cannibalization:** Multiple pages targeting the same keyword may be causing them to compete against each other.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)

### New Optimization Strategy

  - [The strategy will focus on two page groups, prioritized for their higher potential ROI:](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
    1.  [**Pages with recent traffic drops:** These pages already ranked, so a refresh is more likely to restore performance.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
    2.  **Underperforming pages:** Published before June 2025 with \<5 clicks/month.
  - [**Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [**Refresh Content:** Add new information and resubmit to GSC for re-indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [**Add Publish Dates:** This leverages the "freshness" signal, which Google's LMs are now using as a key ranking proxy.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [**Improve Internal Linking:** A Screaming Frog crawl will provide accurate link data, replacing manual analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
      - [**Prune Low-Value Content:** Removing underperforming pages can improve the overall "working content" ratio, signaling higher quality to Google.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)

### Editorial Updates

  - [**TLDRs:** The final 35 TLDRs will be completed this week.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [**Question Center:** Two examples are ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
      - [**Goal:** Replace the TLDR cadence with Question Centers.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
      - [**Process:** Homebase team provides async feedback → GrowthX refines the pipeline → Production begins.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Sonia:**](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
      - [Send the Webflow glossary CMS export to Jakub.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
      - [Provide feedback on the two Question Center examples.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
      - [Grant GrowthX backend access to publish the final 35 TLDRs.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [**Kerry:**](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
      - [Provide feedback on the two Question Center examples.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
  - [**Jakub:**](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
      - [Merge the Webflow export with Ahrefs data to create the optimization priority list.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [**Matthew:**](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
      - [Begin Question Center production once feedback is incorporated.](https://fathom.video/share/GspyJb4jCRz7cj9mVHCg6VNsvzo2ARCH?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
